title: The Trouble with Women
writer: Richard Bransten, Ruth McKenney, Benjamin Sacks
actors: Ray Milland, Teresa Wright, Brian Donlevy
plot: A psychology professor comes up with a theory that women have a desire to be subjugated. A newswoman, using a pseudonym, accuses him of advocating wife-beating. There is trouble after he falls in love with her, unaware of who she is.
